title: LoRa Environmental Field Station
description: Solar-powered remote environmental monitoring node using a BME280 sensor for temperature, humidity, and barometric pressure. An Arduino Pro Mini or ATmega328P sleeps between readings; an SX1276/RFM95W LoRa radio transmits a compact JSON payload to a base-station gateway every 5 minutes. MicroSD card logs locally as backup.
objective: Transmit T/RH/P readings every 5 min; LoRa range ≥ 2 km; battery life ≥ 7 days without sun; solar-extended indefinite runtime; locally logged data on microSD.
constraints: 3.7 V LiPo 2000 mAh; 5 W solar panel; waterproof IP65 housing; 868 MHz LoRa; ≤ £30 BOM per node.
supporting_fact_titles: BME280 Combined Pressure, Humidity, and Temperature Sensor
LoRa / LoRaWAN — LPWAN for Remote Telemetry
Solar Panel Sizing for Remote IoT Stations
NTP Time Synchronisation for Data Logging
design_element_titles: MCU Deep-Sleep Duty Cycle Power Management
Solar Panel + LiFePO₄ MPPT Power System

element_usage_notes.BME280 Environmental Sensor Module (I²C): Weather-station mode; OS1 all channels; polled once per 5-min wakeup cycle; powered via MOSFET switch (GPIO 6) to eliminate standby current.
element_usage_notes.SX1276 LoRa Radio Module (RFM95W): 868 MHz; SF10; BW 125 kHz; CR 4/5; +14 dBm output; transmit then sleep; typical Tx duration 370 ms per packet.
element_usage_notes.MCU Deep-Sleep Duty Cycle Power Manageme: Arduino Pro Mini in power-down sleep; 8-s watchdog timer wakes MCU; 37 wakeups = 5 min; sleep current 0.36 µA (MCU) + 1 µA (RTC).
element_usage_notes.Solar Panel + LiFePO₄ MPPT Power System: 5 W / 6 V panel; CN3791 MPPT charger IC; 2000 mAh LiPo; average Tx power 2.3 mA; sleep power 0.5 mA → daily budget 3.4 mAh active + 2 mAh sleep.
element_usage_notes.MicroSD 1 Hz Time-Series Data Logger: Logs one CSV row per wakeup: ISO timestamp, T, RH, P. FAT32; 2 GB card stores > 2 years of data at 5-min intervals.
element_usage_notes.Arduino Uno/Nano MCU Platform: Arduino Pro Mini 3.3 V 8 MHz (eliminates on-board USB and power LED); I²C on A4/A5; SPI on D10–D13 shared by SD and LoRa with separate CS.

element_interactions.data: temp_c (float), humidity_pct (float), pressure_hpa (float) via I²C on wakeup
element_interactions.description: On each 5-min wakeup: GPIO 6 HIGH powers BME280; 100 ms stabilisation; single I²C read; GPIO 6 LOW powers down sensor to eliminate 3.6 µA standby drain.

element_interactions.data: CSV row string (timestamp, T, RH, P)
element_interactions.description: After BME280 read, MCU writes one CSV row to SD card. SD powered via GPIO 7 MOSFET switch; powered only during write to reduce idle current.

element_interactions.data: JSON payload bytes: {node_id, seq, T, RH, P, batt_mv}
element_interactions.description: LoRa packet sent after SD write; 18-byte compact binary (not JSON for air-time efficiency); receives ACK from gateway for confirmed delivery. Tx duration ~370 ms at SF10.

element_interactions.from: MCU Deep-Sleep Duty Cycle Power Management
element_interactions.description: MCU enters power-down sleep after LoRa Tx; watchdog wakeup counter incremented each 8-s ISR; at count 37 triggers full measurement + transmit cycle.
